Quick summary:

- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

**Patients**
- **CU-001** — 34 months, 12.4 kg, **0.15 mg/kg** → **1.86 mg**, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-14**, PK clearance **3.2 mL/min**
  - Note: Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- **CU-002** — 18 months, 9.1 kg, **0.12 mg/kg** → **1.09 mg**, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-12**, PK clearance **2.8 mL/min**
  - Note: Responding well; weight gain improving
- **CU-003** — 51 months, 15.7 kg, **0.18 mg/kg** → **2.83 mg**, **q2w**, next dose **2026-04-10**, PK clearance **4.1 mL/min**
  - Note: New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

**Upcoming dosing order**
1. CU-003 — 2026-04-10  
2. CU-002 — 2026-04-12  
3. CU-001 — 2026-04-14  

**PK models**
From the latest dosing config, everything looks **stable at a config level**: all three patients have current PK-derived parameters and there aren’t any obvious anomalies in the recorded clearances or notes. That said, this was **not** a fresh model-health validation run—just a review of the latest dosing file.

If you want, I can also format this into a shorter message ready to forward directly to Dr. Martinez.
